# Site: Institut Collectif de l'IA
# URL: https://www.iciafrance.com/en/
# Description: Institut Collectif de l'IA (ICIA) ,  Understanding artificial intelligence. Building capacity to act. Creating a more inclusive transition. Programs, training, resources. Marseille, France.
# Language: English

## Mission
AI is no longer just for engineers, labs or large corporations. It is progressively redefining expected skills, professions, access to information, creation, automated decisions, and economic and democratic balances.

## Our Commitments
- Intellectual independence: ICIA champions a rigorous, pluralistic and evidence-based approach.
- Public interest: Our actions aim for access, understanding, and collective capacity to act.
- Accessibility: AI must not become a skill reserved for a minority.
- Critical thinking: Understanding AI also means understanding its limits, biases and impacts.
- Concrete action: Beyond discourse, we prioritize real uses, operational skills and measurable results.

## What We Do
- Training and awareness programs
- Applied research and observatories
- Territorial and organizational support
- Open resources
- Public debates and events

## Who We Serve
- Citizens: Understanding uses, risks, opportunities and daily transformations.
- Professionals: Adapting skills, integrating tools, developing critical and operational use.
- Organizations: Structuring a pragmatic, human and responsible AI strategy.
- Public and territorial actors: Preparing for economic, educational and social transformations.
- Educational world: Building new skills without falling for hype or oversimplification.

## Programs
- Impact Program: A skills development program designed to support those facing AI-driven transformations.
- ICIA Territories: AI acculturation for local authorities, non-profits and local stakeholders.
- ICIA Education: AI skills, pedagogy and educational transformation.
- ICIA Work & Skills: Employment, career transition, job evolution and new professional capabilities.

## About
The Institut Collectif de l'IA (ICIA) is a French non-profit association dedicated to the collective challenges of artificial intelligence.

Our conviction is simple: the AI transition will be neither purely technical nor purely economic. It is also cultural, educational, social and democratic.

The Institut Collectif de l'IA is based in Marseille, in the same location as Mariusia.
4 boulevard Jacques Saadé, 13002 Marseille ,  France

## Governance
The Institut Collectif de l'IA (ICIA) is an independent non-profit association.

Mentivis serves as the Institute's educational operator and engineering partner.

## Contact
https://www.iciafrance.com/en/contact

## Parent Organization
Mentivis SAS
https://www.mentivis.com
